assertions.title: Built bundle still loads and exposes the plugin surface

steps.action: Run Node one-shot smoke script loading dist/index.js with @opencode-ai/plugin shim and invoking config + flow_plan_start + flow_status + flow_history
steps.expected: Bundle loads, config hook runs, and three tools execute with valid response shapes
steps.observed: Script exited 0; config agents=5, commands=7; tool statuses flow_plan_start=ok, flow_status=planning, flow_history=ok

steps.action: Check temp worktree Flow artifacts after tool execution
steps.expected: .flow/active, session.json, and docs/index.md exist for active session
steps.observed: All expected artifacts were present; session directory entries were ["docs", "session.json"]

assertions.title: Bundle sanity — size, externalization, sourcemap, Node 22+ execution

steps.expected: JSON report confirms size <= 700KB, external peer import retained, sourcemap valid, Node >= 22 load success with shim
steps.observed: Script exited 0; sizeBytes=452451, hasExternalPeerImport=true, inlinesCreateOpencodeClient=false, sourceMapVersion=3, sourceMapHasMappings=true, nodeMajor=25, shimTagVerified=true

steps.expected: Sourcemap references sources under src/ and bundle sanity invariants hold
steps.observed: Script exited 0; hasSourceUnderSrc=true with all invariants satisfied

assertions.title: Benchmark gate — saveSession improvement, no >5% regression elsewhere

steps.expected: Gate parser passes for baseline/results benchmark table checks
steps.observed: Script exited 0 with message: Bench gate passed for 12 baseline row(s)

steps.action: Re-run bun run bench and analyze against bench/RESULTS.md
steps.expected: Recorded rows include CI, warm save shows >=2x improvement vs M1 cold baseline, and rerun means are within 15% of recorded values
steps.observed: Analysis script exited 0; warmImprovementX=4.35; 12/12 rows had CI and rerun deltas <=15%

summary: Tested 3 node-script assertions (VAL-PERF-005, VAL-CROSS-007, VAL-CROSS-009): all passed with captured stdout/stderr/exit-code evidence.
